overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk street at night and entering a Japanese ramen shop. The scene features detailed futuristic urban architecture with holographic signs, atmospheric steam, and warm interior lighting contrasting with the cool exterior neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with food stalls

events.description: pedestrian in red pants walks from right to left across the path
approaching the illuminated entrance of the ramen shop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk toward the neon-lit ramen shop entrance

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at the outdoor food stall
pedestrian in red pants and black shirt walking across the path

entered.detail: large circular neon sign with Japanese characters and 24h indicator
street vendor stall with wooden counter and equipment
two blue plastic barrels next to the food stall
red paper lantern hanging near the shop entrance
steam rising from vents in the background creating atmosphere

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered cyberpunk pedestrian street at night, passing an outdoor food stall with a vendor. Neon signs illuminate the scene including a prominent ramen shop sign ahead. A pedestrian crosses the path as the camera approaches the shop entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: Japanese ramen restaurant interior with counter seating

events.description: crossing the threshold from the street into the warmly lit ramen shop
slowing down to observe customers eating at the counter

agents.ego_description: entering the ramen shop and walking along the counter, observing the customers and interior details

notable_agents.action: customer with white hair sitting at the counter eating noodles
customer with dark hair sitting at the counter eating and drinking

entered.detail: multiple red paper lanterns hanging above the counter with Japanese characters
metal bar stools lined up along the wooden counter
illuminated menu sign with Japanese text above the kitchen area
television screen mounted on the wall showing news broadcast
open kitchen with staff preparing food behind the counter

segments.scene_description: Inside the ramen shop, the camera moves along the counter past customers eating noodles under warm red lanterns. The interior features tiled floors, neon accent lighting, and an open kitchen. A television plays news in the background as the camera continues toward the back of the restaurant.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a cool, neon-lit pedestrian street into the warm, intimate interior of a Japanese ramen shop. It begins by gliding along a covered walkway at night, passing an outdoor food stall and a crossing pedestrian under the glow of vibrant holographic signs. As the camera approaches the entrance of the ramen shop, the scene shifts from the open urban air into a cozy indoor space characterized by tiled floors and red lanterns. The perspective then moves steadily along the counter, passing customers eating noodles and an open kitchen while a television plays news in the background. The movement finally carries the viewer deeper into the restaurant, transitioning from the blue and purple hues of the city to the saturated red and gold tones of the interior.
